description_long: This object is a stylized, polygonal handgun rendered in a vibrant purple color with angular, faceted surfaces that give it a low-poly, geometric appearance. The main body and slide are sharply contoured, with exaggerated, crystalline planes and edges. The grip is adorned with a string of dark, spherical beads, possibly mimicking a decorative or ergonomic feature, and a metallic gold element with the mirrored text 'RND' is attached at the base. The trigger area is minimally defined, blending into the overall angular design, while the barrel is short and integrated into the polygonal form without distinct separation. The overall aesthetic is modern and abstract, with a focus on bold color and unconventional form rather than realism.
description: A faceted, polygonal purple handgun with a beaded grip and a gold 'RND' embellishment, featuring sharp geometric lines and a modern, abstract design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular, faceted body and slide, with the beaded grip and gold 'RND' detail visible below.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed barrel, symmetrical facets, and the full beaded grip encircling the lower section with the 'RND' element clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the polygonal structure and beaded grip visible, emphasizing the sharp, crystalline lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the slide, the beaded grip forming a semicircle, and the gold 'RND' detail at the base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is visually distinctive, featuring a string of dark, spherical beads that wrap around its lower section, providing both a decorative and potentially ergonomic function. The grip itself is angular and faceted, matching the overall polygonal style of the object, with no visible finger grooves or checkering. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with the beads adding a contrasting texture. A metallic gold embellishment with the mirrored text 'RND' is attached at the base, serving as a unique design element.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is minimally defined, blending into the angular, faceted body of the object without a pronounced curve or separation. It appears as an integrated part of the polygonal structure, lacking traditional undercuts or reinforcement, and does not feature any visible texturing or accessories. The design is abstract and geometric, prioritizing form over functional detail.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and polygonal, seamlessly integrated into the faceted body with no visible threading, porting, or external features. Its profile is angular and tapers to a point at the front, consistent with the overall crystalline aesthetic. There are no visible markings or finishes distinct from the rest of the object.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible traditional slide markings, engravings, or inscriptions such as manufacturer logos, model names, or serial numbers. The only notable marking is the gold 'RND' embellishment attached to the base of the grip, which is mirrored and stylized.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is visually represented by a metallic gold element with the mirrored text 'RND', attached at the bottom of the grip. It is flat and rectangular, with a decorative rather than functional appearance, and does not feature finger rests or texturing beyond the bold, stylized lettering.
